docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $742.00 FILED BY HUYNH, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT AMAR, MARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $116.25 SERVED APR-07-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMAR, MARINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HUYNH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARINA AMAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMAR, MARINA $427.00 PRINCIPAL, $146.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $573.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
